species.notes: Dog support is now paper-pinned through sample-level SRA and GenBank anchors, but runtime normalization beyond governed curation review is still not implemented.

scientific_scope: Dog support is paper-pinned through sample-level SRA and GenBank anchors. Those archive tokens count only when the primary paper names them explicitly.
runtime_scope: Current runtime normalization and reporting remain human AADR-first until species-specific collectors and archive bridges are implemented.
